verified_capabilities: CLI analyze works on bundled and custom briefs
CLI generate exports repo-local artifact bundles
API analyze endpoint returns structured deterministic analysis
API generate endpoint writes repo-local bundles
UI home, analyze, generate, and reset flows work locally
Eval runner executes 22 local cases and writes eval outputs
English and Russian UI output localization exists
Short or underspecified briefs trigger clarification behavior
inferred_capabilities: The project is suitable as a deterministic local demo for brief triage
The repo can be demoed credibly in an interview if positioned as an MVP
The evaluation harness is useful for regression checking within the current rule-based system
not_verified_capabilities: Robust contradiction detection across broad real-world wording variation
Consistently high-value delivery artifact quality across many brief styles
top_findings: Contradiction detection still misses one contradiction family on realistic overloaded English and Russian phrasings outside the curated corpus.
Russian exports still leak English product labels and inferred values, reducing trust in bilingual consistency.
Generated artifacts are complete but often too shallow, repetitive, or echo-like to feel like strong delivery documents.
Eval results provide real regression signal but overstate semantic robustness because the corpus is still curated around the rule set.
The repository still contains avoidable presentation noise such as a tracked .DS_Store.
blockers: Harden overloaded-brief contradiction detection for wording variants involving tiny teams, urgency, multi-platform scope, and integrations.
Localize inferred product and audience labels inside Russian exports instead of mixing Russian wrappers with English values.
Improve artifact depth so MVP guidance decomposes scope rather than repeating the brief.
Tighten repo presentation and README claims to match verified behavior exactly.
recommendations: Expand contradiction tests with phrasing-variant adversarial cases beyond the current eval corpus.
Normalize or localize inferred taxonomy labels before rendering exports.
Refactor goal extraction so overloaded paragraphs are not treated as one monolithic goal.
Upgrade generated artifacts with more concrete scoping structure, dependency framing, and explicit tradeoff summaries.
Remove tracked junk files and reduce stage-label noise before using this repo as a flagship portfolio piece.
